items.title: Barcelona sign Gordon from Newcastle for $82M
items.summary: Barcelona have announced the signing of England forward Anthony Gordon from Newcastle United on a five-year contract.

items.title: Dembélé declares himself fit for UCL final
items.summary: Ousmane Dembélé has declared himself fit for Paris Saint-Germain's Champions League final Arsenal on Saturday and said that winning last year's Ballon d'Or cannot compare to winning major honours with the Ligue 1 champions.

items.title: Injured Davies headlines Canada's WCup roster
items.summary: Canada captain and Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies was named to Jesse Marsch's final 26-man World Cup squad despite carrying a hamstring injury that could sideline him for the tournament opener.

items.title: Sources: Chelsea want $161M for Enzo Fernández
items.summary: Chelsea are expected to demand a fee in the region of £120 million ($161m) if Enzo Fernández tries to force his way out of the club this summer, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: NWSL top scorer Banda injured late in Pride's win
items.summary: Orlando Pride forward Barbra Banda extended her NWSL Golden Boot lead with a two-goal performance before suffering an unspecified late injury in Friday's 3-1 win over Bay FC.

items.title: 'Matured' Reyna tired of talking WC controversy
items.summary: USMNT midfielder Gio Reyna said that he's matured since the last World Cup, and feels the experience that the squad has from the 2022 World Cup will help with the "little details."

items.title: Mexico prez gives away her ticket to WC opener
items.summary: Mexico President Claudia Sheinbaum delivered a promise on Friday by giving away her ticket to the World Cup opening match.

items.title: 👀 World Cup kit ranking: All 105 jerseys on show
items.summary: The 2026 World Cup will be the first with 48 teams, bringing a total of more than 100 kits! Here they all are, ranked from worst to first.
